name: opl-foundation-skills
description: Source-only Codex plugin for OPL Framework base and support skills.

interface.shortDescription: AI-first support skills for OPL Framework operators and agent authors.
interface.longDescription: Provides source-only OPL support skills for Runway compute diagnosis, runtime/provider/environment soak and recovery audit, Stagecraft stage design and quality-gate/admission critique, Connect source/skill routing and connector receipt audit, Foundry Lab agent improvement and promotion/rollback briefing, Workspace handoffs and source-readiness audit, Ledger evidence curation, Console/App operator guidance, Pack admission and capability ABI review, Atlas capability routing, Charter authority review, completion audit writing, incident root-cause/conflict/nonprogress triage, eval harness design, domain progress transition review, owner evidence intake review, source-module/upstream/private-tail boundary review, memory/artifact/local-data lifecycle curation, agent package trust and lifecycle review, and specialist external skill routing. These skills preserve AI-first judgment while keeping runtime, provider, receipt, owner, release, Brand L5, live-readiness, and readiness authority in OPL Framework and domain owner surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Foundation Skills to review a Runway compute handoff.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to design a Stagecraft stage prompt.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to route sources, handoffs, evidence, packs, catalogs, authority, or agent improvements.
